name: deep-space
description: Live deep space dashboard — DSN Now, spacecraft tracker, mission events, imagery, ground map. Eleventy + Alpine.js, built for GitLab Pages / Xibo signage.

scripts.fetch:all: npm run fetch:dsn && npm run fetch:spacecraft && npm run fetch:iss && npm run fetch:events && npm run fetch:imagery && npm run fetch:news && npm run fetch:meta
